availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - See Kreuger's comments + add the second discalimer “Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.” Add a lin0 (or a first lin1) for *rho-cross* which is cleary above lin1? is it a <:0. *rho-cross* vac.?= PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|1. *rho-cross*:>ⲛⲁⲓ ⲛⲉ? lin5-6=> ⲛ̣[ⲧϩⲉ ⲛ]6.- [ⲇ]ⲁⲛⲓⲏⲗ (add reconstruction & hyphen, but put the delta in the lacuna at the beginning of lin6 according to the image); lin6=> ⲉⲧⲟⲟⲧⲟⲩ <:ⲛ7.- [ⲛ]= PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|<:ⲛ[ⲛ]|alt|ⲛ[.?]:>:><:ἐκκλησία=grc|reg|ⲉⲕⲕⲗⲏⲥⲓⲁ:> (since the left edge of the flake as been broken up)

Vote - AcceptText - Commentary: Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations. lin1=> ⲛⲁⲓ ⲛⲉ (add space) lin3=> ⲙ[ⲡⲉ<:χριστός=grc|reg|(ⲭ(ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟ)ⲥ):> ϩⲛ ⲟⲩⲙⲉ] (add reconstruction) lin5=> ⲛ<:ϣⲟⲩⲟⲩⲁϣϥ|reg|ϣⲟⲩⲁϣϥ:> (add reg); ⲛ̣[ⲧϩⲉ ⲛⲇ]6.- ⲁⲛⲓⲏⲗ (add reconstruction & hyphen) lin6=> ⲉⲧⲟⲟⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ[.?]7.- <:ἐκκλησία=grc|reg|ⲉⲕⲕⲗⲏⲥⲓⲁ:> (add lacuna & hyphen)

Submit - Entered according to the edition. Please check Greek loanwords carefully. Not sure what to do about the ends of lines 3, 5 and 6: Crum placed a question mark at the end of each line. vestig might be possible mark up.

div.p: Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations. Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.

div.ab:
ⲛⲁⲓ ⲛⲉ ⲛκανώνⲕⲁⲛⲱⲛ ⲙⲡⲉⲛⲉⲓⲱⲧ ⲉⲧⲟⲩ
ⲁⲁⲃ ⲁⲡⲁ ⲁⲛⲁⲛⲓⲁⲥ ⲡἐπίσκοποςⲉⲡⲓⲥⲕⲟⲡⲟⲥ ⲛⲣⲙⲟ
ⲛⲧ ⲡⲣⲱⲙⲉ ⲉⲧφορεῖνⲫⲟⲣⲉⲓ ⲙⲡⲉχριστόςⲭⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ ϩⲛ ⲟⲩⲙⲉ
ⲡⲉπνευματοφόροςⲡⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁⲧⲟⲫⲟⲣⲟⲥ ⲡϣⲏⲣⲉ ⲛⲛἀπόστολοςⲁⲡⲟⲥ
ⲧⲟⲗⲟⲥ ⲁⲩⲱ ⲡⲣⲱⲙⲉ ⲛϣⲟⲩⲟⲩⲁϣϥϣⲟⲩⲁϣϥ ⲛⲧϩⲉ ⲛ
ⲇⲁⲛⲓⲏⲗ ⲛⲧⲁϥⲧⲁⲁⲩ ⲉⲧⲟⲟⲧⲟⲩ ⲛ
ⲛἐκκλησίαⲉⲕⲕⲗⲏⲥⲓⲁⲛⲛⲛ
ἐκκλησίαⲉⲕⲕⲗⲏⲥⲓⲁ ⲉⲧⲣⲉⲩⲁⲣⲉϩ ⲉⲣⲟⲟⲩ
